projectDescription: A daily auto-updated ranking list of the most-starred and most-forked GitHub repositories, broken down by programming language, powered by the GitHub GraphQL API.
keyFeatures: Top 100 most-starred repositories across 34 programming languages
Daily automatic updates via cron + GitHub Actions
GitHub GraphQL API v4 integration with pagination support
Historical daily CSV snapshots dating back to 2018
Markdown output for README and per-language Top100 files
Covers 34 languages including Python, JavaScript, Go, Rust, TypeScript, and more
publicApiSurface: ProcessorGQL.get_all_repos() — fetches stars, forks, and per-language repo lists via GraphQL
ProcessorGQL.get_repos(gql) — paginates through GitHub GraphQL search results
ProcessorGQL.parse_gql_result(result) — parses raw GraphQL response into repo dicts
WriteFile.write_readme_lang_md() — generates README.md and Top100/*.md markdown files
WriteFile.save_to_csv() — saves all ranking data to a dated CSV in Data/
get_graphql_data(GQL) — low-level GraphQL POST wrapper with retry logic
write_ranking_repo(file, method, repos) — writes a markdown ranking table to a file
auto_run.sh — shell script for cron-based daily execution and git push
